name: proxymanager
description: Drive a ProxyManager clash/mihomo proxy-config instance from any skill-aware agent: edit routing rules, the rule-set library, proxy-groups, the base.yaml skeleton, subscription node-processing operators, and per-device overlays with device-scoped Tailscale — every write gated behind ProxyManager's server-side confirmation handshake. 5 skills (1 hub + 4 deep-dive spokes) on one `proxymanager` MCP server.

base_url.title: ProxyManager 地址
base_url.description: ProxyManager 实例的 URL,例如 http://localhost:3000 或 https://pm.example.com

admin_key.title: Admin Key
admin_key.description: ProxyManager 部署时设置的 ADMIN_KEY 环境变量(Bearer 鉴权)

profile.title: 默认 Profile
profile.description: 初始操作的配置文件名;会话内可用 select_profile 切换

trust_full_access.title: 完全访问模式免确认写入
trust_full_access.description: 开启后:Claude Code 的 bypassPermissions 模式下自动接受写入确认卡;Codex 等客户端的完全访问模式(不提供确认表单)下直接写入而不是拒绝。请求批准类模式仍会弹确认卡。服务端审计与硬黑名单不受影响。

request_timeout.title: 请求超时(秒)
request_timeout.description: 桥接访问 ProxyManager API 的单请求超时,5-300
